opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain started around my belly button yesterday, but now it's sharp and stuck down in my right side.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Pain has moved and gotten sharper over the last day and I've stopped wanting to eat.

symptom_narrative.onset: started around the belly button about 24 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: 24 hours, worsening and changing location over the last 8 hours
symptom_narrative.character: started as a vague ache, now sharp and constant
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: moderate to severe, worse than yesterday
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: moved from around my belly button to stuck down in my right side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really, lying still with my knees up helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around, coughing, and the car ride home from work made it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lost my appetite completely, felt sick and vomited once this afternoon, feel a bit warm
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can still walk but I'm bent over, stairs are hard

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, relies on public transport, worried about getting to a doctor while in this much pain

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to know if this can wait until morning or needs immediate care, and how to get there without a car

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes symptoms clearly but downplays severity of transport barrier

access_barriers.transport: lives alone, relies on public transport which is unsuitable given current mobility
